title: pyrus calocarpa
intro: Pyrus calocarpa, also known as the Chinese pear tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. The bark, leaves, and fruits of Pyrus calocarpa have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus calocarpa are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and improving digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. Pyrus calocarpa is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules.
